name: Icons
description: Purple UI uses Font Awesome icons throughout. Free Solid and Regular icon sets are bundled. Icons are referenced by their FA name (e.g. faArrowRight, faXmark).

packages.ios: FontAwesome Swift package or icon PNG assets
packages.android: FontAwesome Android library or icon drawable assets

usage.ios: FA.arrowRight (PUButton/PUIconButton accept icon: IconDefinition via FA namespace)

colourRule: Icon colour always inherits from the parent component token — never hardcode icon colours
